description: This file defines a React functional component for a login page, including form validation, user interaction, and API integration.

methods.name: validateForm
methods.description: Validates email and password fields, sets inline error messages, and returns whether the form is valid.

methods.name: clearFieldError
methods.description: Clears validation error for a specific field when user types.

methods.name: handleSubmit
methods.description: Handles form submission by validating fields, calling loginUser API, managing success/error states, and redirecting on success.
